meta.tagline: Your corner of the market — day trades, long-term holds, and steady progress.

hero.headline: Trade smarter. Build patience. Grow the long game.
hero.subhead: Branching beyond day trading into the kind of long-term positions that stories like Netflix and Amazon are made of — one careful step at a time.

philosophy.title: Why baby steps matter
philosophy.body: Markets reward consistency more than hero shots. After a rough month, the goal isn't to "make it all back" overnight — it's to protect capital, learn, and compound knowledge the same way we hope to compound returns.
philosophy.pullQuote: I'm looking to branch out — not only day trading but long-term deals that turn out like Netflix or Amazon. Just have to take baby steps.

focusAreas.title: Where energy goes
focusAreas.subtitle: Inspired by full-service platforms — distilled into a personal playbook.

items.title: Active trading
items.description: Disciplined entries, defined risk, and journaling what actually worked — so intuition becomes process.

items.title: Long-term positions
items.description: Quality names, time in the market, and adding on dips instead of chasing every headline.

items.title: Continuous learning
items.description: Earnings, macro trends, and position sizing — the boring stuff that keeps accounts alive.

journey.title: The journey (JSON for now)
journey.subtitle: Content here loads from JSON so you can swap in real watchlists, goals, or notes later — no database required yet.

milestones.detail: Rebuild routine: small size, clear rules, document every trade.
Allocate a slice of capital to 3–5 conviction long-term names.
Connect a database or API when you're ready to sync live data.

disclaimer.title: Not financial advice
disclaimer.body: Buy Buy Stocks is a personal workspace and learning log. Nothing here is a recommendation to buy or sell any security. Investing involves risk; past performance does not guarantee future results.

footer.note: Built for focus — deploy anywhere, iterate often.
